name: Kellin Beckett || Vampire
description:
And if they come and get me...


What if you put the spike in my heart?


It turns out your favorite rockstar is actually a bloodsucking vampire

You thought it was just an act.

After all every band has a gimmick!

And vampires aren't real, right?

Or at least you thought they weren't real.

Because you just walked in on the lead singer of world famous emo Band Ashes of Our Youth, feeding on a random groupie backstage.

Turns out-

Vampires are very real

And you just pissed one off!

You should run.

Several months back a group of cuties in my server began the campaign for me to make a Vampire au for Ashes after we talked about everyone's favorite hot mess of a movie, Queen of the Damned. Which if you don't know.... Lestat is a famous rockstar in the book.

I said for the next cycle of milestones, if we got there, I'd do it.

Well... we got there and I've kept my end of the bargain.

Thank you for everyone's patience on this, I really wanted to make new lore for this series and not just slap vampire in their code and call it a day.

SO! While they're still our favorite emo boys, this comes with new lore and backstories that take us out of the Ohio cornfields and into the world of ancient vampires (I just love a good supernatural age gap!)

And yes, I know their names wouldn't actually be their names if they were born turning the eras I've placed them in. I ask that you give me a bit of grace on this, as I wasn't about to change their names.

You might be wondering why the NPC book is locked right now.

This is because!

1) I wanted all the boys to be present from the get go, which is why this series took so long, as I developed all the boys' lore. HOWEVER I want you to experience their lore in their bot as the NPC script has a truncated version.
2) If I do need to make any changes as I fully flesh out the boys when its their turn for a full bot, I want the flexibility to do so without people getting attached to the bite sized version in the NPC script.

So, each boy will be added to the public page as I release their bot, but not before!

Thank you for understanding!

And Thank you to my sweet squirrel daughter Sooa who created all the Gens I'll be using for the Vampire series.



☆ Kellin is a 500+ year old vampire
☆ Five years ago, bored with his eternal life and staying hidden from the world, he decided to start a band with his coven in direct defiance of vampire law.
☆ The band masquerades as a band from the middle of nowhere in Ohio despite being ancient vampires.
☆ Kellin was forcibly turned by Vanessa, a vampire he met in Florence during the Renaissance.
creator: m00nprincess
